name: Singing Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the melted chocolate.
4. Mix in raisins.
5. Fold in cinnamon and cloves with flour.
6. Gently fold in chopped nuts and strawberry jam.
7. Combine stiffly beaten egg whites with baking powder and buttermilk.
8. Mix gently until just combined.
9. Pour batter into a greased and floured angel food cake pan.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes, or until the cake stops singing.
Make sure to keep guests present during the entire baking process. Once the cake is baked, enjoy it!
